name: aivi-analyzer-worker
description: AiVI Analyzer Worker Lambda - SQS consumer for async analysis jobs

scripts.build: npm ci --production && zip -r worker.zip index.js analysis-serializer.js preflight-handler.js pii-scrubber.js package.json package-lock.json node_modules prompts schemas shared/schemas
scripts.package: zip -r worker.zip index.js analysis-serializer.js preflight-handler.js pii-scrubber.js package.json package-lock.json node_modules prompts schemas shared/schemas
